creator: donaldcallen@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 169015
dmesg followed by Xorg log

On the machine described by the attached dmesg with 10.3 release installed (though it says 10.3-Beta2 in the bug report's version, since Bugzilla hasn't been updated), X will not start. The Xorg log is attached, cat'ed to the dmesg, since this marvelous bug reporting system only allows me to attach one file.
